content.json:
## SOCRadar Entra ID — VIP Protection Dashboard
> VIP user exposures found by SOCRadar, enriched with Microsoft Entra ID lookup.

parameters.name: TenantId
parameters.label: Entra ID Tenant
parameters.query:
union isfuzzy=true SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where isnotempty(entra_tenant_id)
| distinct entra_tenant_id
| project value = entra_tenant_id, label = entra_tenant_id
| union (datatable(value:string, label:string)['All','All'])
| order by label asc

content.query:
SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| count
| project Count
content.title: Total Records

content.query:
SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| where entra_status == "found"
| count
| project Count
content.title: Found in Entra ID

content.query:
SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| count
| project Count
content.title: Last 24 Hours

content.query:
SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| summarize Count=count() by entra_status
| order by Count desc
content.title: Entra ID Status

content.query:
SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| summarize Count=count() by status
| order by Count desc
content.title: Record Status

content.query:
SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| summarize Count=count() by keyword
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Top Keywords

content.query:
SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Records Over Time

content.query:
SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| project TimeGenerated, email, vip_name, keyword, status, discovery_date, entra_status
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
content.title: Recent VIP Records

content.query:
SOCRadar_VIP_CL
| where '{TenantId}' == 'All' or entra_tenant_id == '{TenantId}'
| where isnotempty(entra_tenant_id)
| extend src = case(Type == 'SOCRadar_Botnet_CL', 'Botnet', Type == 'SOCRadar_PII_CL', 'PII', Type == 'SOCRadar_VIP_CL', 'VIP', 'Other')
| summarize Records=count(), Found=countif(entra_status == 'found'), Compromised=countif(entra_status == 'compromised') by entra_tenant_id, src
| order by Records desc
content.title: Tenant Breakdown
